_readme: Free MCP stack replacing the Anthropic paid connectors.
Providers marked 'API_KEY_REQUIRED' need a key stored as an N8N Header Auth credential.
Providers marked 'NO_AUTH' are fully public (SEC EDGAR, Yahoo Finance).
OpenBB must be self-hosted (no public hosted endpoint available).
Replace YOUR_ORACLE_HOST with your Oracle Cloud instance hostname or IP.

sec-edgar._auth: NO_AUTH - public US government API, no key required
sec-edgar._n8n: No credential needed. Use HTTP Request node directly.

yahoo-finance._replaces: morningstar + lseg (market data, quotes, market cap)
yahoo-finance._auth: NO_AUTH - public data, no key required
yahoo-finance._n8n: No credential needed. Use HTTP Request node directly.

alpha-vantage._auth: API_KEY_REQUIRED - free key at alphavantage.co (25 req/day free tier)
alpha-vantage._n8n: Create Header Auth credential: Header=apikey, Value=YOUR_ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY

fmp._replaces: sp-global (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, ratios)
fmp._auth: API_KEY_REQUIRED - free key at financialmodelingprep.com (250 req/day free tier)
fmp._n8n: Create Header Auth credential: Header=apikey, Value=YOUR_FMP_KEY

frb-fred._replaces: moodys + lseg (yield curves, credit spreads, FX rates, macro)
frb-fred._auth: API_KEY_REQUIRED - free key at fred.stlouisfed.org (unlimited free tier)
frb-fred._n8n: Create Header Auth credential: Header=api_key, Value=YOUR_FRED_KEY

brave-search._replaces: mtnewswire + aiera (news, press releases, earnings announcements)
brave-search._auth: API_KEY_REQUIRED - free key at brave.com/search/api (2000 req/month free tier)
brave-search._n8n: Create Header Auth credential: Header=X-Subscription-Token, Value=YOUR_BRAVE_KEY

crunchbase-free._replaces: pitchbook (VC deals, funding rounds, investors, board data)
crunchbase-free._auth: API_KEY_REQUIRED - free key at crunchbase.com (200 records/day free tier)
crunchbase-free._n8n: Create Header Auth credential: Header=X-cb-user-key, Value=YOUR_CRUNCHBASE_KEY

openbb._replaces: morningstar (ratios, screeners, ETF holdings, portfolio analytics)
openbb._auth: NO_AUTH - self-hosted open source instance on Oracle Cloud
openbb._n8n: No credential needed. Points to your self-hosted OpenBB instance.
openbb._note: OpenBB has no public hosted MCP endpoint. Must be self-hosted. See: github.com/OpenBB-finance/openbb-mcp

google-drive._replaces: egnyte + chronograph (document management, portfolio tracking spreadsheets)
google-drive._auth: OAuth2 - use Google OAuth2 credential in N8N
google-drive._n8n: Create Google OAuth2 credential in N8N. Scopes: drive.readonly or drive.file

filesystem._auth: NO_AUTH - local stdio process, no network call
filesystem._n8n: Not applicable. Runs as a local stdio process via Claude Code or Claude Desktop.
